creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
The enclosed patches upgrade the ports
	. www/horde-devel from 2.0 RC3 to 2.0 RC4;
	. mail/turba from 1.0 RC3 to 1.0 RC4;
	. mail/imp-devel from 3.0 RC3 to 1.0 RC4

	and they take care of their dependences (among them
	deskutils/kronolith already is in the ports).

Fix: The following uuencoded tar.gz file contains patches to be applied
	to www/horde-devel, mail/turba, mail/imp-devel and deskutils/kronolith.
How-To-Repeat: 	NA.
